heading: EXEMPTION FROM AD VALOREM TAXATION OF RAW COCOA AND GREEN COFFEE
operative_text: (a) The legislature by general law may exempt from ad valorem taxation raw cocoa and green coffee that is held in Harris County. (b) The legislature may impose additional requirements for qualification for an exemption under this section.
_note: No explicit cross-references or defined terms present in this section. Section added Nov. 6, 2001, per Acts 2001, 77th Leg., R.S., S.J.R. 6.
